ValidationRule.description: 12.12.2017, ary: Gleiche Bemerkung wie bei Account.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
OR( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Phone)), IF(BEGINS(Phone,"+41"),NOT(REGEX(Phone ,"[+41]{3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}")),NOT(REGEX(Phone, "[+]{1}[0-9 ]*"))) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Fax)), IF(BEGINS(Fax,"+41"),NOT(REGEX(Fax ,"[+41]{3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}")),NOT(REGEX(Fax, "[+]{1}[0-9 ]*"))) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(MobilePhone)), IF(BEGINS(MobilePhone,"+41"),NOT(REGEX(MobilePhone ,"[+41]{3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}")),NOT(REGEX(MobilePhone, "[+]{1}[0-9 ]*"))) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(PrivateMobile__c)), IF(BEGINS(PrivateMobile__c,"+41"),NOT(REGEX(PrivateMobile__c ,"[+41]{3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}")),NOT(REGEX(PrivateMobile__c, "[+]{1}[0-9 ]*"))) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(HomePhone)), IF(BEGINS(HomePhone,"+41"),NOT(REGEX(HomePhone ,"[+41]{3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}")),NOT(REGEX(HomePhone, "[+]{1}[0-9 ]*"))) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(AssistantPhone)), IF(BEGINS(AssistantPhone,"+41"),NOT(REGEX(AssistantPhone ,"[+41]{3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}")),NOT(REGEX(AssistantPhone, "[+]{1}[0-9 ]*"))) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(OtherPhone)), IF(BEGINS(OtherPhone,"+41"),NOT(REGEX(OtherPhone ,"[+41]{3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){3}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}(\\s){1}(\\d){2}")),NOT(REGEX(OtherPhone, "[+]{1}[0-9 ]*"))) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All Phone and Fax numbers must be in International format, starting with "+" and nothing else that numbers and spaces. IF the number is a Swiss number it has to be in the format "+41 xx xxx xx xx". (CO003)
